name: northstar
description: Local-first accomplishment tracker that Claude keeps current as a side effect of real work.

scripts.dev:app: wait-on packages/server/dist/index.mjs && NORTHSTAR_PORT=7788 NORTHSTAR_DATA_DIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/Northstar-dev" npm -w @northstar/app run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:app
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run prepare:runtime && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm -w @northstar/app run dist:builder
